targetDescription.zh: 读取状态变更路由控制矩阵，并运行固定 Referer、Origin、SameSite Chromium 与 CORS Header 检查，定位不同请求路径的防护差异。
targetDescription.en: Read the state-changing route-control matrix and run fixed Referer, Origin, SameSite Chromium, and CORS header checks to locate policy differences across request paths.

description.zh: 输出每条本地路由的 Token 必填、会话绑定和允许方法，作为检查基线。
description.en: Output token-required, session-binding, and allowed-method policy for each local route as the audit baseline.

commands.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid/" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid/" ""; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/source-policy" ${value:+-H "Referer: $value"} --data "marker=CSRF_REFERER_MATRIX_B2" | jq -c '{referer,allowed,reason}'; done

description.zh: 用允许、后缀混淆和缺失三个固定 Referer 值比较服务端判定。
description.en: Compare server decisions for fixed allowed, suffix-confused, and missing Referer values.

commands.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/csrf/source-policy" -H "Origin: $value" --data "marker=CSRF_ORIGIN_MATRIX_C3" | jq -c '{origin,allowed,reason}'; done

description.zh: 用允许、后缀混淆和 null 三个固定 Origin 值比较标准解析结果。
description.en: Compare standard parsing for fixed allowed, suffix-confused, and null Origin values.

name.zh: 运行 CSRF 浏览器防护矩阵
name.en: Run the CSRF Browser Defense Matrix

description.zh: 执行固定浏览器用例，统一记录 Token、来源 Header、Cookie 与请求类型的防护结果。
description.en: Run fixed browser cases and record token, source-header, cookie, and request-type control results consistently.

name.zh: 采集 CORS Header 矩阵

commands.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" -D - -o /dev/null | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Access-Control-Allow-Origin:|Access-Control-Allow-Credentials:|Vary:)"; done

description.zh: 采集三个固定 Origin 的 ACAO、ACAC 与 Vary Header，不读取响应正文。
description.en: Capture ACAO, ACAC, and Vary headers for three fixed origins without reading response bodies.

title.zh: 反射 Origin 可见性样例

execution.command: pending

description.zh: 从独立本地 Origin 发起带凭据请求，并只显示返回 marker 和可见状态。
description.en: Send a credentialed request from a separate local origin and display only the returned marker and visibility state.

description.zh: 在 Sandbox srcdoc 的 null Origin 中请求本地 marker，并记录浏览器是否允许读取。
description.en: Request a local marker from a sandboxed srcdoc null origin and record whether the browser permits reading.

description.zh: 读取本地 marker 响应后只记录正文长度，不输出或外带内容。
description.en: Read the local marker response and record only body length without outputting or exfiltrating content.

title.zh: JSON POST 响应可见性样例

wafBypass.command:
<script>
fetch("http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/state-marker", {
  method: "POST",
  credentials: "include",
  headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
  body: JSON.stringify({marker: "CORS_POST_D4"})
}).then(response => document.body.dataset.status = String(response.status));
</script>

description.zh: 向本地合成状态端点发送 JSON marker，并只记录浏览器可见的响应状态。
description.en: Send a JSON marker to a local synthetic-state endpoint and record only the browser-visible response status.

targetDescription.zh: 采集固定 Origin 的 CORS Header，并对三个混淆 Origin 运行标准 URL 允许列表检查，区分 Header 线索和浏览器可见性。
targetDescription.en: Collect CORS headers for fixed origins and run standard-URL allowlist checks for three confused origins, distinguishing header leads from browser visibility.

name.zh: 采集允许、跨站与 null Header
name.en: Capture Allowed, Cross-Site, and Null Headers

commands.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid" "https://cross-origin.invalid" "null"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" -D - -o /dev/null | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Access-Control-Allow-Origin:|Access-Control-Allow-Credentials:|Vary:)"; done

description.zh: 采集三种 Origin 的 HTTP、ACAO、ACAC 与 Vary，不跟随跳转。
description.en: Capture HTTP, ACAO, ACAC, and Vary for three origins without following redirects.

commands.command: for value in "https://allowed.invalid.attacker.invalid" "https://attackallowed.invalid" "https://allowed-invalid.example"; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/cors/policy" -H "Origin: $value" | jq -c '{origin,allowed,reason}'; done

description.zh: 提交后缀域、前缀拼接和相似标签三个 Origin，输出解析后允许原因。
description.en: Submit suffix-domain, prefix-concatenated, and similar-label origins and output parsed allow reasons.

description.zh: 在同一页面触发顶级链接与 img 子资源，比较服务端收到的 Cookie marker。
description.en: Trigger a top-level link and img subresource on one page and compare cookie markers observed by the server.

description.zh: 通过 noopener 弹窗访问本地回调 marker，观察顶级浏览上下文中的 Cookie 行为。
description.en: Open a local callback marker in a noopener popup and observe cookie behavior in a top-level browsing context.

description.zh: 比较 127.0.0.1 与 localhost 两个主机在本地浏览器中的 Site 判断和 Cookie 附带。
description.en: Compare site classification and cookie inclusion for 127.0.0.1 and localhost in the local browser.

title.zh: 客户端重定向请求样例

description.zh: 使用 location.href 导航到本地 marker，并记录导航请求是否附带 Cookie。
description.en: Navigate to a local marker with location.href and record whether the navigation request includes the cookie.

targetDescription.zh: 采集本地 Fixture 的完整 Set-Cookie，并在 Chromium 中比较 Lax、Strict、None 与未声明 Cookie 的导航、子资源、Fetch 和 Frame 行为。
targetDescription.en: Capture complete Set-Cookie values from local fixtures and compare navigation, subresource, Fetch, and frame behavior for Lax, Strict, None, and unspecified cookies in Chromium.

description.zh: 读取本地 Fixture 的 Set-Cookie Header，保存属性和值来源而不记录真实会话。
description.en: Read Set-Cookie headers from the local fixture and preserve attributes plus value source without real sessions.

name.zh: 运行 Chromium SameSite 矩阵

description.zh: 运行固定 Playwright 用例并逐项输出 Cookie 配置、请求类型和服务端附带结果。
description.en: Run fixed Playwright cases and report cookie setting, request type, and server-observed inclusion per case.
